Dialog.Title: Recall Knowledge
Dialog.CategoryHeading: What are you trying to recall?

Warning.NoTarget: Target exactly one creature or hazard first.
Warning.MultipleTargets: Target exactly one creature or hazard — you have more than one targeted.
Warning.InvalidTargetType: Recall Knowledge can only be used on creatures or hazards.
Warning.NoRollingActor: You don't have a character assigned to roll with.
Warning.AlreadyAttempted: You've learned what you're going to learn about this creature for now.

Error.RollFailed: The Recall Knowledge roll couldn't be completed.
